column1: # F2 EDIT — Backspace deletes char before cursor; Delete deletes char at cursor.
# Backspace at end → deletes 'o'; cursor → 5; buffer `'hell`.
# Home → 0, then Right ×2 to land between 'h' and 'e' (cursor=2 within
# Delete removes the char at the cursor — the 'e'. Cursor stays at 2;
# Backspace at cursor=2 deletes 'h' before it; cursor → 1; buffer `'ll`.
# Backspace at cursor=1 deletes the prefix `'`; cursor → 0; buffer `ll`.
# This re-applies the first-char rule on commit (label vs value vs prefix).
# Backspace at cursor=0 is a no-op.
